plan_metadata.name: group: fill in azure serarch env

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
env_file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_VftUE/env/.env.local.user"

if [ ! -f "$env_file" ]; then
    echo "File does not exist: $env_file"
    exit 1
fi

# Add or update the required values in the .env.local.user file
sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=/d' "$env_file"
echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$env_file"
sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=/d' "$env_file"
echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$env_file"
sed -i '/^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=/d' "$env_file"
echo "SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}" >> "$env_file"
sed -i '/^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=/d' "$env_file"
echo "AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net" >> "$env_file"

echo "Updated contents of $env_file:"
cat "$env_file"
```

Language: bash

```bash
ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_VftUE/env/.env.dev.user"

if [ -f "$ENV_FILE\" ]; then
  sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
else
  echo "Creating new .env file at $ENV_FILE"
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$ENV_FILE")"
  touch "$ENV_FILE"
fi

echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$ENV_FILE"
echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$ENV_FILE"
echo "SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}" >> "$ENV_FILE"
echo "AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net" >> "$ENV_FILE"

cat "$ENV_FILE"
```

ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_VftUE/env/.env.playground.user"

if [ -f "$ENV_FILE\" ]; then
  {
    echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=text-embedding-ada-002"
    echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002"

else

fi
